name: qc
description: Quality Control toolkit — black-box tester agent (independent of DEV) with 2 dedicated QC skills: qc-mobile-testing (Appium CLI for native/RN apps) and qc-web-testing (Playwright CLI for browsers). QC verifies acceptance criteria, hunts edge cases, files clear bug reports with severity, re-tests after fixes. Project memory recall is delegated to /second-brain:project-memory-recall with role=qc.
